title: P0: Fix HtnPlanner sync-over-async deadlock risk in LLM fallback
description:
HtnPlanner.TryLlmFallback uses sync-over-async: `.ConfigureAwait(false).GetAwaiter().GetResult()` on _llm.CompleteAsync. This blocks the entire dispatch loop for up to 15s+ and risks deadlock if the SynchronizationContext is single-threaded. The LLM call uses CancellationToken.None, making it uncancellable.

Fix: Make IPlanner.PlanAsync fully async-through (Task<IPlan> with await throughout the chain). Propagate the cancellation token to the LLM call. The entire planning chain (PlannerRouter → decomposers → HtnPlanner → TryLlmFallback) needs to be async-all-the-way-down.

Source: internal-audit-57-20260701.md — P0-7 [PR]
